# Nmap

```zsh
PORT   STATE SERVICE REASON  VERSION
139/tcp   open  netbios-ssn   Microsoft Windows netbios-ssn

445/tcp   open  microsoft-ds?
```

---

# Enumeration


- 総合列挙
	- enum4linuxも失敗
```sh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/ProvingGrounds/Hokkaido]
└─$ smbmap -H hokkaido-aerospace.com                                         

    ________  ___      ___  _______   ___      ___       __         _______
   /"       )|"  \    /"  ||   _  "\ |"  \    /"  |     /""\       |   __ "\
  (:   \___/  \   \  //   |(. |_)  :) \   \  //   |    /    \      (. |__) :)
   \___  \    /\  \/.    ||:     \/   /\   \/.    |   /' /\  \     |:  ____/
    __/  \   |: \.        |(|  _  \  |: \.        |  //  __'  \    (|  /
   /" \   :) |.  \    /:  ||: |_)  :)|.  \    /:  | /   /  \   \  /|__/ \
  (_______/  |___|\__/|___|(_______/ |___|\__/|___|(___/    \___)(_______)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
SMBMap - Samba Share Enumerator v1.10.7 | Shawn Evans - ShawnDEvans@gmail.com
                     https://github.com/ShawnDEvans/smbmap

[*] Detected 1 hosts serving SMB                                                                                                  
[*] Established 1 SMB connections(s) and 0 authenticated session(s)                                                          
[!] Access denied on 192.168.151.40, no fun for you...                                                                       
[*] Closed 1 connections         
```

- smbの列挙
```sh
netexec smb $TargetIP --shares
SMB         192.168.151.40  445    DC               [*] Windows Server 2022 Build 20348 x64 (name:DC) (domain:hokkaido-aerospace.com) (signing:True) (SMBv1:False)                                                                        
SMB         192.168.151.40  445    DC               [-] Error enumerating shares: STATUS_USER_SESSION_DELETED

┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/ProvingGrounds/Hokkaido]
└─$ netexec smb $TargetIP -u guest -p '' --shares
netexec smb $TargetIP -u anonymous -p '' --shares
SMB         192.168.151.40  445    DC               [*] Windows Server 2022 Build 20348 x64 (name:DC) (domain:hokkaido-aerospace.com) (signing:True) (SMBv1:False)                                                                                                                                                      
SMB         192.168.151.40  445    DC               [-] hokkaido-aerospace.com\guest: STATUS_ACCOUNT_DISABLED 
SMB         192.168.151.40  445    DC               [*] Windows Server 2022 Build 20348 x64 (name:DC) (domain:hokkaido-aerospace.com) (signing:True) (SMBv1:False)                                                                                                                                                      
SMB         192.168.151.40  445    DC               [-] hokkaido-aerospace.com\anonymous: STATUS_LOGON_FAILURE 

```

- 認証情報が必要

## spray

- [[kerberos- 88]]で入手したユーザー名に対してパスワードブルートフォース
	- infoはパスワードもinfoであったので、discoveryのみを確認
```sh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/ProvingGrounds/Hokkaido]
└─$ netexec smb hokkaido-aerospace.com -u unusual_usernames.txt -p /usr/share/wordlists/fasttrack.txt --continue-on-success
```
- →なし

---

## 共有の列挙

- "discovery"のパスワードのブルートフォースは継続しながら、infoアカウントでsmbを列挙してみる
	- netexecでは失敗したが、smbmapでは成功した(==複数ツール使うの大事==)
```sh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/ProvingGrounds/Hokkaido]
└─$ smbmap -u info -p info -H hokkaido-aerospace.com       ...                                                                                          
[*] Established 1 SMB connections(s) and 1 authenticated session(s)                                                          
                                                                                                                             
[+] IP: 192.168.154.40:445      Name: hokkaido-aerospace.com    Status: Authenticated
        Disk                                                    Permissions     Comment
        ----                                                    -----------     -------
        ADMIN$                                                  NO ACCESS       Remote Admin
        C$                                                      NO ACCESS       Default share
        homes                                                   READ, WRITE     user homes
        IPC$                                                    READ ONLY       Remote IPC
        NETLOGON                                                READ ONLY       Logon server share 
        SYSVOL                                                  READ ONLY       Logon server share 
        UpdateServicesPackages                                  READ ONLY       A network share to be used by client systems for collecting all software packages (usually applications) published on this WSUS system.
        WsusContent                                             READ ONLY       A network share to be used by Local Publishing to place published content on this WSUS system.
        WSUSTemp                                                NO ACCESS       A network share used by Local Publishing from a Remote WSUS Console Instance.
[*] Closed 1 connections           
```

### homes(READ, WRITE)

```sh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/ProvingGrounds/Hokkaido]
└─$ smbclient -W hokkaido-aerospace.com -U 'info' \\\\hokkaido-aerospace.com\\homes
Password for [HOKKAIDO-AEROSPACE.COM\info]:
Try "help" to get a list of possible commands.
smb: \> ls
  .                                   D        0  Thu Feb 12 10:07:13 2026
  ..                                DHS        0  Thu Feb 12 09:38:19 2026
  Angela.Davies                       D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023
  Annette.Buckley                     D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023
  Anthony.Anderson                    D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023
  Catherine.Knight                    D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023
  Charlene.Wallace                    D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023
  Cheryl.Singh                        D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023
  Deborah.Francis                     D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023
  Declan.Woodward                     D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023
  Elliott.Jones                       D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023
  Gordon.Brown                        D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023
  Grace.Lees                          D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023
  Hannah.O'Neill                      D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023
  Irene.Dean                          D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023
  Julian.Davies                       D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023
  Lynne.Tyler                         D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023
  Molly.Edwards                       D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023
  Rachel.Jones                        D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023
  Sian.Gordon                         D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023
  Tracy.Wood                          D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023
  Victor.Kelly                        D        0  Sat Nov 25 23:57:09 2023

```
- それぞれユーザー名と思われる一覧を入手

- 一括でファイルを入手
```sh
smb: \> recurse on
smb: \> mask ""
smb: \> prompt off
smb: \> mget *
```

- 固まったのでmount。。。と思ったが、nxcでBloodHoundして、どのユーザーを優先的に列挙するかをあたりをつける（⚠️ほかのユーザーのディレクトリに、狙ったユーザーの情報があるかもしれないので、見逃していいというわけではない）
- →[[ldap- 636,3268,3269]]

- Kerberoastなどの攻撃は失敗（ハッシュのクラックできず）だったので、SMBを列挙する
```sh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/ProvingGrounds/Hokkaido]
└─$ mkdir mount_point
                                            
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/ProvingGrounds/Hokkaido]
└─$ sudo mount -t cifs //192.168.154.40/homes mount_point/ -o username=info,password=info

[sudo] password for koshi: 

┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/ProvingGrounds/Hokkaido]
└─$ cd mount_point


┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/ProvingGrounds/Hokkaido/mount_point]
└─$ tree         
.
├── Angela.Davies
├── Annette.Buckley
├── Anthony.Anderson
├── Catherine.Knight
├── Charlene.Wallace
├── Cheryl.Singh
├── Deborah.Francis
├── Declan.Woodward
├── Elliott.Jones
├── Gordon.Brown
├── Grace.Lees
├── Hannah.O'Neill
├── Irene.Dean
├── Julian.Davies
├── Lynne.Tyler
├── Molly.Edwards
├── Rachel.Jones
├── Sian.Gordon
├── Tracy.Wood
└── Victor.Kelly
```

- 特にファイルはない。(*書き込み可能ではある*)
